name: Christmas Crumble (English)
recipeInstructions:
1. Set oven to 400°F or Mark 6.
2. To make the crumble mixture, sift the flour into a bowl and rub in the margarine until the mixture resembles breadcrumbs.
3. Stir in the ground almonds and the sugar.
4. Place the mincemeat in an ovenproof dish and cover with the drained sliced peaches. Reserve 8 peach slices for decoration.
5. Top the dish with the crumble mixture.
6. Bake for 25-30 minutes until the crumble is golden brown.
7. Decorate with the reserved peach slices and glace cherries.
8. Serve hot with custard or cream.
